name: Lumpia
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the spring roll wrappers.
2. Mix thoroughly all ingredients except lumpia wrappers and oil.
3. Take a heaped tablespoon of the mixture and roll it in a lumpia wrapper, forming rolls about 3/4 inch in diameter. Cut into 2-inch pieces using a very sharp knife.
4. Deep fry in oil until golden brown.
5. Serve with soy sauce and calamansi (or lime) or lumpia sauce.
